name: pi-web-platform
description: HY-Webagent — Multi-user AI Coding Agent Hub

scripts.install:all: npm run install:server && npm run install:client
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start
